msg: warning: Variable buffer is used uninitialized!
reasoning: The tool reports 'buffer' as used uninitialized at line 11, columns 26-34, which is 'sizeof(buffer)' in the for-loop condition. sizeof() is a compile-time operator that does not read the contents of buffer; no uninitialized memory access occurs here. The vbdb-documented bug (664e3aa) is a BufferOverflow: after the for loop finishes, i equals sizeof(buffer) (1024), so 'buffer[i] = 0' at line 14 writes one byte past the end of the array. The tool reports the wrong bug at the wrong location. False positive.
